sections.dashboard: Executive overview, KPIs and recent fleet activity
sections.vehicles: Fleet registry, list actions and exports
sections.billing: Subscription plans, usage and monetization controls
sections.map: Live vehicle positions, filters and location updates
sections.reminders: Upcoming due dates, overdue items and reminder queues
sections.activity: Recent actions, operational events and workspace movement

sectionDescriptions.vehicleDetails: Vehicle overview, history, documents, analytics and PDF export
sectionDescriptions.vehicleForm: Create or update a fleet record with operational and financial data

search.placeholder: Global search by VIN, plate, model, driver or company
search.hint: Start typing at least two characters to search across the fleet.

auth.loginSubtitle: Monitor your fleet, contracts, compliance and transfers from one secure workspace.
auth.registerSubtitle: Launch a multilingual fleet workspace for your team and start managing vehicles in minutes.

registration.companyDescription: Creates a company workspace for your fleet team. Platform admin access is never granted automatically.
registration.companyHint: Company registration creates a dedicated workspace and starts with an operational manager account. Elevated admin rights are assigned deliberately later.
registration.individualDescription: Creates a personal workspace for daily operations. You can manage your own data without receiving platform admin access.
registration.individualHint: A personal workspace will be created automatically for this account.

auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email and we will send a reset link if the account exists.
auth.passwordResetRequested: If the account exists, a reset email has been sent.
auth.resetPasswordSubtitle: Use the secure reset link from your email to set a new password.
auth.registerSuccess: Workspace created successfully. Check your inbox to verify your email.

verify.title: Verify your email address
verify.subtitle: We use email verification to protect workspace access, invitations and shared fleet records before the first sign-in.
verify.resendHint: Open the message we sent earlier, or request a fresh link if you no longer have it.
verify.expiredHint: This verification link is no longer valid. Request a new verification email to continue.
verify.footer: Verification links expire automatically to keep company access secure.
verify.loginBlockedDescription: Verify {{email}} before signing in to this workspace.

onboarding.title: Finish your workspace setup in one secure step.
onboarding.subtitle: Confirm the basics before you enter daily operations. We store only lightweight preferences here so your team sees a polished, trustworthy workspace immediately.

preferences.title: Choose your daily working defaults
preferences.subtitle: These settings are stored locally and can be changed later in Settings.

hero.title: Fleet operations with clear ownership, audit trails and multi-company visibility.
hero.subtitle: Soli Car gives operations teams one secure workspace for vehicles, documents, incidents, maintenance, transfers and analytics across every company in the fleet structure.

companies.label: Company structure
companies.description: Separate fleet ownership, users and analytics by company scope.

vehicles.label: Operational fleet
vehicles.description: Show active, transferred, archived and service-bound records in one product.

activity.label: Operational trace
activity.description: Every transfer, incident, maintenance event and approval stays visible.

snapshot.title: Built for real fleet workflows, not just CRUD screens.
snapshot.subtitle: The demo workspace highlights current company ownership, operational deadlines, transfer history and fleet-level analytics so non-technical stakeholders can understand the product immediately.

transfers.title: Company ownership stays explicit
transfers.description: Each vehicle belongs to one company right now, with transfer history preserved for review.

compliance.title: Deadlines are visible before they become risks
compliance.description: TUV, insurance and maintenance reminders are surfaced from the same operational dataset.

ownership.title: Documents, incidents and maintenance stay connected
ownership.description: Operational context follows the vehicle record across updates, approvals and archive views.

features.title: A product presentation stakeholders can understand in minutes.
features.subtitle: The landing experience explains how Soli Car supports operational teams without hiding the complexity of real multi-company fleet management.

fleet.title: Fleet management
fleet.description: Run vehicle operations from one registry with status control, exports and role-aware actions.

companies.title: Multi-company structure
companies.description: Keep company ownership, users and fleet visibility separated without losing central oversight.

history.title: History tracking
history.description: Transfers, lifecycle changes and sensitive actions stay visible through audit-friendly history.

maintenance.title: Maintenance records
maintenance.description: Store service history, reminders, costs and repair progress alongside the vehicle.

documents.title: Documents and uploads
documents.description: Keep contracts, insurance files and supporting evidence attached to the right record.

analytics.title: Analytics and alerts
analytics.description: Use dashboards to explain fleet size, deadlines, company distribution and operational risk.

visibility.title: Clear company boundaries
visibility.description: Vehicles, users and company pages make current ownership obvious for every active record.

security.title: Secure account access
security.description: Email verification, scoped permissions and private uploads help the demo feel production-ready.

demo.title: Strong demo data
demo.description: Seeded companies, transfers, incidents and maintenance events make the product feel alive immediately.

finalCta.title: Open the workspace and explore the fleet demo.
finalCta.subtitle: Use the secure sign-in flow to move from the product presentation into dashboards, company pages and vehicle operations.

dashboard.title: Run your vehicle operations with live visibility and enterprise control.
dashboard.subtitle: Track compliance deadlines, leasing contracts, transfers and fleet activity across companies from one dashboard.
dashboard.workspaceTitle: Everything important stays one click away
dashboard.workspaceSubtitle: Use the dedicated sections to move from overview to operations without losing context.
dashboard.analyticsSubtitle: See the deadlines and workload that matter most before they turn into operational risk.
dashboard.recentSubtitle: Quick access to the latest records touched across the workspace.
dashboard.companiesSubtitle: Make it obvious which company currently owns each vehicle and how the fleet is split across the workspace.
dashboard.companiesEmptyDescription: Create or import vehicles to populate the multi-company overview.
dashboard.recentActivitySubtitle: Keep an eye on the latest operational changes across vehicles, documents, support and approvals.
dashboard.analyticsSnapshot: Upcoming deadlines in the next 30 days
dashboard.filtersSubtitle: Refine the fleet list by status, company and sort order without leaving the page.

import.title: Bulk import
import.subtitle: Upload an Excel sheet to add multiple vehicles in one action.
import.adminHint: Without a company filter, imports go to your own company.

table.title: Vehicle registry
table.emptyDescription: Try a different filter or create the first vehicle record for this workspace.

vehicles.title: Manage every vehicle from one operational workspace.
vehicles.subtitle: Switch between dense table workflows and card-based browsing without losing actions, permissions or context.
vehicles.filtersSubtitle: Use search, status and company filters to move quickly through large fleets.
vehicles.searchPlaceholder: Filter by model, VIN, plate or driver
vehicles.emptyArchivedDescription: Archived vehicles will appear here when they are moved out of active operations.
vehicles.archivedEditHint: Restore this vehicle before editing its record.
vehicles.archivedTransferHint: Archived vehicles must be restored before transfer.

companies.title: Review the tenant structure behind your fleet workspace.
companies.subtitle: Use this area to inspect workspace companies and keep the organizational model transparent.
companies.restrictedTitle: Company directory is limited to admins
companies.restrictedDescription: Managers and viewers can work with fleet data, but only admins can inspect the cross-company directory.
companies.emptyDescription: The workspace does not contain any registered companies yet.
companies.detailEmptyDescription: Choose a company to review members, invitations and vehicles in its scope.
companies.workspaceSubtitle: Manage members, monitor invitations and keep operational ownership visible for every company.
companies.noVehiclesDescription: Vehicles assigned to this company will appear here for quick operational review.

invites.title: Invitations
invites.emptyDescription: Create an invitation to bring a new teammate into this workspace.
invites.createSubtitle: Assign the future company role up front. Invitation acceptance never grants platform admin access.

analytics.title: Monitor compliance and operational workload with clarity.
analytics.subtitle: A cleaner view of risks, deadlines and workload helps teams act before issues impact the fleet.
analytics.emptyDescription: Create vehicles first to unlock trends, charts and fleet-level cost visibility.
analytics.costsSubtitle: Projected leasing, insurance and tax exposure for the next operating window.
analytics.mileageSubtitle: See expected monthly mileage volume and the current average fleet baseline.
analytics.maintenanceSubtitle: Track how service work and maintenance spend move over time.
analytics.damageSubtitle: Keep an eye on active damage exposure and the share of vehicles with a clear status.
analytics.prioritySubtitle: Understand how much of the current workload is urgent, upcoming or already stable.
analytics.complianceSubtitle: See which compliance areas are carrying the most pressure across the selected fleet scope.

billing.title: Manage subscription tiers and fleet capacity.
billing.subtitle: Keep every company on the right plan, monitor usage and move between free and paid tiers without leaving the workspace.
billing.mockModeDescription: Stripe keys are not configured, so plan changes apply locally for demos and development.
billing.usageSubtitle: Monitor how close the selected company is to its plan limit before vehicle creation is blocked.
billing.vehicleUsage: Vehicles used in the current subscription scope
billing.unlimitedDescription: This plan does not impose a vehicle limit.
billing.modeStripeDescription: Checkout sessions and webhooks are handled through Stripe.
billing.modeMockDescription: Plan changes are simulated locally until Stripe credentials are added.
billing.viewerHint: Only admins can change subscription plans. Managers and viewers can review billing usage and status.
billing.planSubtitle: Upgrade for more fleet capacity or return to the free tier when needed.
billing.planDowngraded: Company moved to the Free plan.

FREE.line1: Best for smaller demos and trial workspaces
FREE.line2: Vehicle cap suitable for onboarding a compact fleet

PRO.line2: Higher vehicle capacity for active fleets

ENTERPRISE.line3: Best fit for large fleets and central operations

map.title: Track vehicle locations on a shared operational map.
map.subtitle: Review the last known position of vehicles, filter the fleet and update locations manually when GPS data changes.
map.searchPlaceholder: Search by model, VIN, plate, driver or company
map.emptyMapDescription: Update at least one vehicle location to populate the map.
map.selectedSubtitle: Inspect the current marker context and update the last known coordinates when needed.
map.emptySelectionDescription: Choose a vehicle from the list or click a marker on the map.
map.neverUpdated: Location has not been updated yet.
map.updateSubtitle: Managers and admins can store a new last known location for the selected vehicle.
map.emptyListDescription: Adjust filters or create vehicles to see them in the map list.
map.invalidCoordinates: Please enter valid latitude and longitude values.

vehicleDetails.statusSubtitle: Adjust lifecycle status and review the next critical dates without leaving the record.
vehicleDetails.documentsSubtitle: Review attached vehicle media and keep a clean space for future supporting files.
vehicleDetails.documentsEmptyDescription: This vehicle currently has no attached media or supporting documents.
vehicleDetails.transferSubtitle: Move this vehicle to another company while preserving the audit history.
vehicleDetails.incidentsSubtitle: Review accident history, repair state and every incident linked to this vehicle.
vehicleDetails.incidentsEmptyDescription: This vehicle currently has no recorded incidents or damage events.
vehicleDetails.archivedDescription: Archived records stay searchable and keep history, documents, incidents and maintenance intact, but active actions are paused until the vehicle is restored.

incidents.noAttachmentsDescription: Upload photos or supporting files when this incident needs evidence or repair context.

maintenance.emptyDescription: Create the first service or repair record to keep the operational trail complete.

share.title: Public vehicle snapshot
share.subtitle: Create a secure read-only link when someone needs operational visibility without workspace access.
share.prompt: Optional label for this share link
share.created: Public share link created and copied.
share.emptyDescription: Create a read-only link when a customer, insurer or external partner needs access.

publicShare.subtitle: This link provides a read-only operational view of one vehicle record.
publicShare.invalid: This public share link is invalid.
publicShare.emptyDescription: The link may have expired, been revoked or no longer exists.
publicShare.trustSubtitle: Shared pages never allow edits, transfers or protected downloads.
publicShare.readOnlySubtitle: Use the main Soli Car workspace for any changes or internal documents.
publicShare.noIncidentsDescription: There are no incident records visible in this snapshot.
publicShare.noMaintenanceDescription: There are no maintenance records visible in this snapshot.
publicShare.noDocumentsDescription: There are no document metadata entries visible in this snapshot.

form.subtitle: Keep compliance, finance and contract data accurate for every vehicle in the fleet.
form.incidentsSubtitle: Track previous accidents, current damage state and every related incident record in one place.
form.incidentHelp: Use this record to capture the damage context and repair state.

incidentValidation.damageStatusRequired: Set a damage status before saving incidents.
incidentValidation.repairedDateRequired: Every repaired incident needs a repaired date.

history.title: Vehicle history
history.subtitle: Every create, update, transfer, status change and deletion is stored here.
history.emptyDescription: The audit timeline will appear here as soon as this vehicle changes.
history.noFieldDiff: This entry does not contain field-level differences.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Upcoming compliance and contract deadlines that need attention.
notifications.emptyDescription: TUV, insurance and contract deadlines are all under control right now.

reminders.title: Track upcoming and overdue operational reminders.
reminders.subtitle: Keep due dates, service reminders and expiring documents visible in one focused view.
reminders.emptyDescription: The selected scope does not contain reminder items right now.

notificationsCenter.title: Notification center
notificationsCenter.subtitle: {{count}} unread notifications
notificationsCenter.pageSubtitle: Track product events, reminders and follow-ups that need your attention.
notificationsCenter.emptyDescription: Important product events will appear here.

activity.dashboardSubtitle: Readable product activity based on the most important operational events.
activity.pageSubtitle: Review recent actions across vehicles, support, approvals, invitations and records.
activity.searchPlaceholder: Search by action, vehicle, document or actor
activity.emptyDescription: Recent operational activity will appear here.

permissions.readOnlyDescription: Your current role can view fleet data but cannot create or edit vehicles.

roleSummary.ADMIN: Admins can operate across companies, transfer vehicles and manage the full workspace.
roleSummary.MANAGER: Managers can work on fleet records, but company-wide actions stay restricted.
roleSummary.VIEWER: Viewers can inspect data, export PDFs and follow activity without editing records.

settings.title: Adjust language, preferences and access context.
settings.subtitle: Keep the interface aligned with how your team works without changing the backend behavior.

language.title: Multilingual experience
language.subtitle: Switch the UI language and keep the entire workspace consistent across pages.

theme.title: Theme preference
theme.subtitle: Choose the visual mode that feels best for daily work across desktop and mobile.
theme.lightOnly: Dark mode has been disabled for now so the workspace stays visually consistent.

preferences.title: Default list layout
preferences.subtitle: Choose whether the vehicle registry opens in table or card mode by default.

profile.title: Current session
profile.subtitle: A quick summary of the active workspace identity and access role.
profile.verificationNoticeBody: Request a fresh verification email if you need to activate this account again.

security.title: Password and account protection
security.subtitle: Update your password without leaving the workspace.
security.passwordMismatch: The new password confirmation does not match.
security.passwordHint: Use at least eight characters and avoid reusing your current password.

session.title: Access and sign-out
session.subtitle: Review active sessions and revoke any access you no longer trust.
session.currentRevoked: Current session revoked. Please sign in again.

support.title: Help and ticketing
support.subtitle: Open the support workspace to track issues, billing requests and operational questions in one thread.

support.title: Support and ticketing
support.subtitle: Create support requests, follow replies and keep every issue in a clear operational thread.
support.newTicketSubtitle: Describe the issue clearly, choose a category and attach a file if it helps the team investigate faster.
support.threadEmptyDescription: Choose a ticket from the list or create a new one to open the conversation thread.
support.emptyDescription: Create the first ticket when your team needs technical, billing or general support.
support.replyHint: Replies are added to the audit-friendly conversation thread for this ticket.
support.closedHint: This ticket is closed. An admin must reopen it before new user messages can be added.

shell.title: Admin control center
shell.subtitle: A dedicated workspace for tenant administration, global fleet control, support operations and audit visibility.

users.title: User management
users.subtitle: Create users, assign roles, change company scope and reset passwords without leaving the admin workspace.
users.emptyDescription: Try a different filter or create a new user account.

companies.title: Company management
companies.subtitle: Create and maintain company records while keeping users, vehicles and ticket scope transparent.
companies.emptyDescription: Create the first company record to extend the workspace structure.
companies.detailEmptyDescription: Choose a company to review users and vehicles in its scope.

vehicles.title: Vehicles across all companies
vehicles.subtitle: Inspect the entire fleet, force transfers between tenants and remove vehicles when admin action is required.
vehicles.searchPlaceholder: Search by model, VIN, plate or company
vehicles.emptyDescription: Adjust filters or wait until vehicle records are created in the workspace.
vehicles.detailEmptyDescription: Choose a vehicle to inspect its current tenant scope and apply admin actions.
vehicles.forceTransferSubtitle: Move this vehicle to another company with the standard audited transfer flow.

tickets.title: Ticket management
tickets.subtitle: Monitor every support request, respond as admin and control status and priority from one workspace.
tickets.searchPlaceholder: Search by ticket, company or user
tickets.emptyDescription: No support tickets match the current filters.
tickets.threadEmptyDescription: Choose a ticket to inspect the conversation and respond as admin.
tickets.replyHint: Admin replies are visible in the user thread and included in the ticket history.

approvals.title: Pending approvals
approvals.subtitle: Review sensitive admin actions before they are executed in production data.
approvals.searchPlaceholder: Search by requester, entity or reason
approvals.emptyDescription: There are no approval requests in the selected scope.
approvals.detailEmptyDescription: Choose an approval request to review its payload and make a decision.
approvals.requestCreated: Approval request created and added to the queue.

logs.title: Global system logs
logs.subtitle: Search login activity, admin actions, support operations and fleet changes across the entire system.
logs.searchPlaceholder: Search by action, entity id or actor
logs.emptyDescription: No system logs match the current search and filter combination.

pdf.reportSubtitle: Enterprise fleet record with operational, financial and audit context.

codes.UNAUTHORIZED: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
codes.FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to perform this action.
codes.VALIDATION_ERROR: Some fields are invalid. Please review the form.
codes.COMPANY_NOT_FOUND: The selected company could not be found.
codes.TARGET_COMPANY_NOT_FOUND: The target company could not be found.
codes.TRANSFER_TARGET_SAME_COMPANY: This vehicle already belongs to the selected company.
codes.TRANSFER_REQUIRED: Use the transfer action to move a vehicle to another company.
codes.VEHICLE_NOT_FOUND: The vehicle could not be found.
codes.INCIDENT_NOT_FOUND: The incident could not be found.
codes.INVITATION_NOT_FOUND: The invitation could not be found.
codes.INVITATION_NOT_ACCEPTABLE: This invitation can no longer be accepted.
codes.INVITATION_EMAIL_MISMATCH: The invitation email does not match this account.
codes.INVITATION_ALREADY_PENDING: A pending invitation already exists for this email.
codes.INVITATION_NOT_REVOCABLE: Only pending invitations can be revoked.
codes.DOCUMENT_FILE_REQUIRED: Choose a document file before uploading.
codes.DOCUMENT_NOT_FOUND: The requested document could not be found.
codes.MAINTENANCE_NOT_FOUND: The maintenance record could not be found.
codes.IMAGE_REQUIRED: Please choose an image before uploading.
codes.FILE_UPLOAD_REQUIRED: Please choose an Excel file before importing.
codes.IMPORT_EMPTY_FILE: The uploaded file does not contain any vehicle rows.
codes.TRANSFER_STATUS_LOCKED: Use the transfer action when a vehicle changes company.
codes.NETWORK_ERROR: The server could not be reached. Please check the connection and try again.
codes.CONFLICT: A duplicate value already exists. Check VIN, plate or email.
codes.USER_NOT_FOUND: The requested user could not be found.
codes.SELF_MODIFICATION_RESTRICTED: This admin action is blocked to protect your own account access.
codes.LAST_ADMIN_REQUIRED: At least one active admin must remain in the system.
codes.PLATFORM_ADMIN_REQUIRES_ADMIN_ROLE: Platform admin access can only be assigned to users with the admin role.
codes.COMPANY_NOT_EMPTY: This company still contains active users, vehicles or tickets.
codes.TICKET_NOT_FOUND: The requested support ticket could not be found.
codes.TICKET_CLOSED: This ticket is closed and cannot accept a new user reply.
codes.SUBSCRIPTION_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: The current subscription plan has reached its vehicle limit.
codes.STRIPE_NOT_CONFIGURED: Stripe is not fully configured in this environment.
codes.FREE_PLAN_CHECKOUT_BLOCKED: The free plan does not require Stripe Checkout.
codes.FREE_PLAN_UPDATE_BLOCKED: Use the free plan action instead of updating a paid subscription item.
codes.STRIPE_SUBSCRIPTION_INVALID: The Stripe subscription response was incomplete.
codes.STRIPE_CHECKOUT_FAILED: Stripe Checkout could not be started.
codes.INVALID_STRIPE_SIGNATURE: The Stripe webhook signature could not be verified.
codes.RESET_TOKEN_INVALID_OR_EXPIRED: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
codes.EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED: Verify your email address before signing in.
codes.EMAIL_VERIFICATION_TOKEN_INVALID_OR_EXPI: This verification link is invalid or has expired.
codes.COMPANY_NAME_ALREADY_EXISTS: A workspace with this company name already exists.
codes.LOGIN_RATE_LIMITED: Too many sign-in attempts. Please try again shortly.
codes.PASSWORD_RESET_RATE_LIMITED: Too many password reset requests. Please try again shortly.
codes.VERIFICATION_RATE_LIMITED: Too many verification requests. Please try again shortly.
codes.APPROVAL_NOT_FOUND: The approval request could not be found.
codes.APPROVAL_ALREADY_RESOLVED: This approval request has already been resolved.
codes.UNSUPPORTED_FILE_TYPE: This file type is not allowed.
codes.FILE_TOO_LARGE: The selected file exceeds the allowed size limit.
codes.UPLOAD_ERROR: The file upload could not be processed.
codes.ATTACHMENT_NOT_FOUND: The requested attachment could not be found.
codes.DOCUMENT_FILE_NOT_FOUND: The stored document file could not be found.
codes.SESSION_NOT_FOUND: The requested session could not be found.
codes.PUBLIC_LINK_NOT_FOUND: The shared vehicle link is invalid or no longer available.
